features.featureTitle: Fix the Admin Panel routing in App.tsx so it is accessible via the hash-based URL pattern used by the deployed site (e.g. /#/admin or /#admin). The current routing logic must be updated to detect the /admin path within the URL hash (window.location.hash) rather than relying on window.location.pathname, since the deployed ICP canister serves the SPA via hash routing. The admin panel at https://jigarchaudhary-tyf.caffeine.xyz/#caffeineAdminToken=... must remain accessible, and navigating to /#/admin (or the equivalent hash-based path) must render the AdminPanel component.
